title: The Glass Orchid Murders
subtitle: Precinct 9 / Homicide / Case 17-A
description: Three victims, one impossible timestamp, and a synthetic orchid left at every scene. The board is shared with the table: investigators can rearrange cards, add links, dim entity types for focus, and reorder the working timeline.

evidence.title: Glass Orchid
evidence.description: A fragile transparent flower containing trace coolant residue.
evidence.notes: The coolant links to the old maglev maintenance tunnels.

evidence.title: Damaged Delivery Drone Black Box
evidence.description: Recovered from a rooftop vent near the third scene.
evidence.notes: Contains a corrupted route ending at Mara Vale's apartment.

evidence.title: Bioluminescent Blood Thread
evidence.description: A faintly glowing fiber found under the victim's collar.
evidence.notes: Matches a gene therapy clinic that closed six years ago.

suspects.name: Mara Vale
suspects.motive: Her brother was killed by one of the victims.
suspects.alibi: Claims she was on a live vidcall during the second murder.

suspects.name: Detective Ives Korr
suspects.motive: Internal affairs pressure and missing evidence from an older case.
suspects.alibi: On duty in the evidence archive.
suspects.notes: Korr signed out the exact drone model used for the black box.

locations.name: Rainmarket Station
locations.description: A closed transit platform below the neon market district.
locations.notes: Security cameras were disabled for exactly 11 minutes.

locations.name: Helix Ward Clinic
locations.description: A shuttered gene therapy clinic in the old medical quarter.
locations.notes: The clinic's freezer logs mention Mara's brother.

timeline.title: First emergency call
timeline.description: Anonymous call reports a body at Rainmarket Station.

timeline.title: Drone signal disappears
timeline.description: A delivery drone drops off the local mesh for six minutes.

timeline.title: Drone signal returns
timeline.description: The drone reconnects above Helix Ward Clinic, then burns out its own navigation cache.
